reviews.comment:
Servicio muy pobre, los surtidores son viejos con tecnologia antigua, esto hace dudosa su eficiencia, ya que estos surtidores no miden con eficiencia la cantidad de litros, el inflador de neumáticos no funciona, no lo recomiendo cargar combustible aca

(Translated by Google)
Very poor service, the pumps are old with outdated technology, this makes their efficiency doubtful, since these pumps do not efficiently measure the amount of liters, the tire inflator does not work, I do not recommend filling up with fuel here.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13088641644358785510/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlN1l5RE9BEAE

reviews.comment:
Lamentablemente solo otorgo 3 estrellas por el siguiente motivo, la falta de combustible en esta sucursal es un inconveniente, son muy reiteradas las veces que hay faltante al menos los días que me toca ir, sería interesante que los socios tengamos un beneficio exclusivo para estas situaciones

(Translated by Google)
Unfortunately, I'm only giving 3 stars for the following reason: the lack of fuel at this branch is a major problem. It's very frequent that there are shortages, at least on the days I go. It would be great if members had an exclusive benefit for these situations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13088641644358785510/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMycXFfX0JREAE
